message: Jake
Jennifer
seems to be out. I wonder if she already went on location?
?　Oh
hi
there!
Seems she's not home. How was the shoot today?
I wonder? Well, if she's not here, it can't be helped.
Looks like she's still not back. In that case, I shouldn't overstay my welcome; I wouldn't want to be mistaken for a burglar or something.
Shopping for a bit has taken quite a while.
No way she up and left the room without telling me, right?
Ah,
I'm glad you came to visit.
I didn’t have anything particular to discuss, though.
Am I bothering you right now?
No, I'm fine.
Well,
I wanted to see you.
Welcome back; it's nice to see you again.
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Move
System
Surroundings
Work stuff
Eva
Meryl
Ginny
Tony
Director Fabar
about
about Eva
about Meryl

to another place

Exit the game
It's a room equipped with the bare minimum for a long stay. For a hotel known for its high rates, the interior is surprisingly simple.
Since the lodging fee is likely covered by the movie company anyway, they could have gotten a nicer room.
It seems like there’s hardly any luggage brought in at all. At this rate, a burglar would have more problems.
Outside the window is the heart of Manhattan, literally a million-dollar view overlooking Fifth Avenue.
She has quite a voluptuous body. A lot of her roles involve bed scenes, probably because of that body.
Even I think it'd be worth going to the theater just to see her body.
Thanks to the incident, she's probably faced all sorts of slander and is mentally exhausted.
Isn't the reason she's prone to misunderstandings because of her seemingly cold appearance?
Thank you for the other day.
Ah, no...
It's odd to say 'the pleasure was mine'.
Well, what do you think?
Hehe.
You know, I feel really lucky to have met you. It's like I've started to see various things more clearly.
I've started to see various things clearly.
Yes, how should I put it...
Yeah, it's fine. I understood.
You must be a deep person, I can’t help but want to know more about you right now.
I thought it was good that I gathered my courage back then.
Back then?
That day?
Yeah.
If I hadn't done that back then, you probably wouldn't be visiting me like this now, would you?
Is that so? I don't think that's the case.
No, I'm sure it is. I think it was.
Otherwise, you might have fallen in love with another woman, right?
I've just realized now that I seem to have strong possessiveness.
R-Really?
Ah, you got flustered just now, didn't you?
No, I didn't, I didn't.
Please, I don't want you to make me feel this heartache.
Filming is about to start again.
I wish I could stay like this longer.
Is filming off today?
I shouldn't have any scenes to shoot. Today is my day off.
Things probably won't progress much without Guy, huh.
It's true that I have a lot of interactions with him, but more than that, Meryl's delays have been messing up the schedule.
It's only recently that I became well-known as an actress, so I’m still pretty bad at acting. It’s a source of worry.
I'm not watching the actual filming, but you gave a great performance in your last leading role.
No, that was nothing yet. But thank you for the compliment. It will motivate me for the future.
Right now, I just want a job, any role will do. I need to build my career quickly.
I love being an actress, but when I really get into a role, it gets tough. I start losing track of the line between fiction and reality.
Hey, if Guy is playing the lover, does that mean it’ll be like that in real life too?
No, I don't think so.
Ugh, I don’t like that. Don't say weird things.
Are you jealous? You don't have to worry, it's just you for now.
Haven't you met Eva Courtney?
Eva Courtney? Who's that? I don't know her.
I used to be a writer for a magazine called BAM. No, I was an editor, right?
Does that person have anything to do with me?
Eva, you know, dealt with gossip, and lately, she's been writing about Guy's gossip.
Guy's? Oh, don't tell me it's about me and Guy being in a relationship or something? That's not true at all; there's nothing going on.
No, that's not it, I’m sorry. It's nothing.
Forget it.
Meryl has been seriously shooting recently. It seems like something good happened.
Yeah, that's great. I mean, it's good that the filming is going smoothly.
Uh, yeah, right.
Hey, do you know what happened to Meryl?
N-no, nothing.
Really? That sounds suspicious.
Are you that curious about Meryl? Or are you trying to make me jealous?
Hey, do you think Meryl and Director Fabar are getting married?
Well, I’m not sure. What's with the sudden question?
Uh.
I was just wondering about it.
Phew.
Hmm.
Lies. Honestly, I was thinking if she married the director, all of his films would just star her.
I wouldn't want that—marrying someone I don't even like just for work.
Oh, don’t get me wrong. I'm not saying Meryl is like that.
I've been wanting to ask for a while, what's your relationship with Ginny?
I don’t know Ginny.
Well, her real name is Annette Wheaton, I think?
You probably heard that from someone else, right? It's just a past about stealing someone I used to go out with.
I'm telling you, that’s all in the past; I don’t hold a grudge or anything.
Right.
Oh, you're suspicious.
I really, really don't hold a grudge.
Okay, I'm sorry, I was wrong.
Do you really think so?
Well, being a detective means I have to ask a lot of questions.
It’s kind of tough.
Speaking of which, I ran into her unexpectedly.
When?
It was recently.
Though, it was a few weeks ago. The thing is,
she was with Tonny Ford.
Oh, in that case, I've seen him too.
I wonder if that guy she used to date dumped her pretty fast.
She always seemed to have guys around her.
I’m not really on good terms with her.
When I saw Tonny at the party, it seemed that way. Did she maybe dump him?
Hmm, I don’t know why, but he seems to dislike me. Most of the bad rumors seem to come from him, it’s a hassle.
I don’t really care about him, but why are you so concerned about him?
No, I’m not concerned, but I just think he has a sketchy vibe.
Sketchy, huh?
Yeah, his words are hard to judge for truth.
I’d rather not talk about this. Let’s change the subject.
You don’t know what Tonny's personality is like, do you?
Uh.
Well, that’s tricky. But there’s something about him that feels untrustworthy. Plus, I’ve heard he’s in quite a bit of debt.
What on earth is he using that debt for?
Maybe he's spending way too much money on women and expensive items.
It’s wiser to stay away from him. You never know what kind of person you might get involved with.
Speaking of directors, hee hee.
I heard Meryl once said that I was trying to take the director's place.
Oh, I know about that.
Wow, has that rumor even reached you?
It's a misunderstanding. So please don't believe it.
Of course I respect the director. But that doesn't mean it leads to romance, you know?
Yeah, but Meryl might have seen it that way. She must be a jealous woman.
I'm probably just as jealous, for sure.
I'm really glad I could work with Director Fabar.
The director has been in a good mood lately. Maybe it's because the filming is slowly but surely progressing.
Can someone really be in a good mood over something so trivial?
Oh, for him, that's everything.
A film director is always consumed by that.
I feel suddenly closer because of that night.
To think I could talk so closely with someone who feels like a star up in the clouds.
I just went with the flow and ended up here. I wonder what will happen to her, no, to us from now on?
Am I in love with her?
She welcomes me with a happy face. When I touch such kindness,
her presence gradually grows within my heart.
I never even dreamed a very ordinary guy like me could become close to an actress.
It's become a sad situation. I shouldn't feel guilty, but it isn’t completely unrelated either.
If I pursue this any further,
it could be misunderstood that I'm suspecting her of being the culprit.
Let's stop; there's no point in thinking about it.
Since Meryl has been in a good mood lately,
there probably won’t be much conflict.
Meryl's daughter is Cindy, and she is friends with her.
They get along well.
I hope they can meet soon, mother and daughter, and be happy.
If she has a family, wouldn't Meryl not marry the director?
I can't help but feel that she longs for a presence she can call family.
Surely, Ginny and
I thought I was hated by Ginny because we had contact in the past.
I believed she had been resentful towards me all along.
Was that feeling just Ginny's misunderstanding?
Or, is someone else hiding that from me?
I can't quite grasp the relationship between Ginny and me.
I'm a bit unclear about Ginny.
the relationship we're having.
Now that Gabriela has canceled the request, it’s no longer my concern.
It all started with Ginny, huh. If Gabriela hadn’t asked me to look for Ginny, I would have had nothing to do with this incident.
Tonny and
apparently don’t get along well.
But isn’t it possible that this all started because of something like Tonny being dumped by
someone?
I really don’t understand.
I don’t quite get this guy Tonny either, and
I have no idea why he would speak ill of.
There’s no way he's doing this because Ginny asked him to, right?
Apparently, Tonny’s debts are well-known.
A cheerful Meryl, a cheerful director.
Isn’t that a good thing?
It’s definitely true that Cindy is a headache for the current director. I have to do something about it.
I can deny it all I want,
but the truth is a mystery.
Is it that they're trying to take the director away from Meryl, as she said?
Come visit again,
I'll be waiting.
※※※ This is a bug ※※※
